diagrams.title: Traditional vs Specialized Computing Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the evolution from single general-purpose CPU to multiple specialized processors (GPU, TPU, NPU)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how separate functions have increased in modern systems

diagrams.title: Energy Flow in Data Center with Separate Functions
diagrams.description: Illustrates how energy is distributed and wasted with multiple specialized hardware components
diagrams.purpose: Visualize where energy is consumed and lost in data centers with fragmented hardware

diagrams.title: Dark Silicon Problem Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how only portions of a chip can be powered on at once due to thermal and power constraints
diagrams.purpose: Understand limitations in chip design due to increased specialized functions

diagrams.title: Virtualization Consolidation Model
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how virtualization combines multiple workloads onto fewer physical servers
diagrams.purpose: Show how consolidation reduces separate functions and improves efficiency
